paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.3, with a change of -4.33% compared to the prior close and -27.56% over the last 22 sessions. Two new news articles have been published in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN and "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, both published on 2026-07-23. These articles discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus, and the admission of shares of Common Stock, respectively.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and other 8-K forms related to the resignation of Miles Everson and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes.
